title: Domain Knowledge with Pinecone Nexus
tagline: Compile your data into task-ready knowledge artifacts with Pinecone Nexus — and ground answers with typed, per-field citations.

story.problem: The agent from Cookbook #1 is fluent but ignorant — and bolting on classic RAG just hands it raw documents at inference time, burning tokens, adding latency, and inviting hallucination.
story.solution: Use Pinecone Nexus as a knowledge engine instead of a plain vector store: its Context Compiler turns your data estate into task-specific knowledge artifacts, and the agent queries them with KnowQL — moving reasoning upstream from retrieval to knowledge compilation.
story.outcome: An agent that answers domain questions from compiled, governed knowledge — with typed fields, per-field citations, and confidence scores instead of plausible guesses.

prerequisites: A Pinecone API key with Nexus access (https://www.pinecone.io)

quickstart.configure: cp .env.example .env  # then fill NEBIUS_API_KEY and PINECONE_API_KEY

endpoints.description: Feed source documents into the Nexus data estate for knowledge compilation.
Answer a question against Nexus-compiled knowledge artifacts and stream SSE events back.
